behavior: complete checkout with valid payment details

test_cases.title: Complete checkout with a valid card
test_cases.objective: Verify the shopper can submit a valid order
test_cases.description: Validates the standard checkout path for a logged-in shopper.
preconditions: The cart contains one in-stock item.

steps.expected_result: The checkout summary and payment form are visible.

steps.action: Enter valid shipping and card details and submit the order.
steps.expected_result: The order is accepted and a confirmation page is displayed.

test_cases.expected_outcome: The shopper sees an order confirmation with a new order number.
test_cases.notes: Use a non-expired Visa test card.

scenarios.title: Complete checkout with a valid card
steps: Given the shopper is signed in
And the cart contains one in-stock item
When the shopper enters valid shipping and card details
And a confirmation page is displayed

zephyr_test_cases.name: Complete checkout with a valid card
zephyr_test_cases.objective: Verify the shopper can submit a valid order
zephyr_test_cases.precondition: Shopper signed in; cart has one in-stock item

steps.expected_result: The checkout summary and payment form are visible

steps.step: Enter valid shipping and card details and submit the order
steps.expected_result: The order is accepted and a confirmation page is displayed
